languages.text: {n}Вы отступаете на шаг и утираете пот со лба тыльной стороной окровавленной руки. Грудь пациента мерно вздымается, и хотя его жизнь еще не спасена, теперь у него есть хоть какие-то шансы дождаться полноценной операции.{/n}

{n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы отступаете на шаг и утираете пот со лба тыльной стороной окровавленной руки. Грудь пациента мерно вздымается, и хотя его жизнь еще не спасена, теперь у него есть хоть какие-то шансы дождаться полноценной операции.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}

{n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}

{n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一歩後退し、血まみれの手に汗を拭い取る。患者の胸は安定して上下する。命は救われていないが、手術を受けるまで生き延びる可能性はある。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 一歩後退し、血まみれの手に汗を拭い取る。患者の胸は安定して上下する。命は救われていないが、手術を受けるまで生き延びる可能性はある。

languages.text: {n}Vous faites un pas en arrière en passant votre main couverte de sang sur votre front pour en essuyer la sueur. La poitrine du patient se soulève à un rythme régulier, et bien que son état reste critique, il a au moins une chance de survivre assez longtemps pour subir une véritable opération.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous faites un pas en arrière en passant votre main couverte de sang sur votre front pour en essuyer la sueur. La poitrine du patient se soulève à un rythme régulier, et bien que son état reste critique, il a au moins une chance de survivre assez longtemps pour subir une véritable opération.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Geri çekiliyor ve kanlı elinin tersiyle alnındaki teri siliyorsun. Hastanın göğsü düzenli bir şekilde inip kalkıyor, hayatı henüz kurtulmamış olsa da en azından tam teşekküllü ameliyat edilene kadar hayatta kalma şansı var.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Geri çekiliyor ve kanlı elinin tersiyle alnındaki teri siliyorsun. Hastanın göğsü düzenli bir şekilde inip kalkıyor, hayatı henüz kurtulmamış olsa da en azından tam teşekküllü ameliyat edilene kadar hayatta kalma şansı var.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du trittst zurück und wischst dir mit dem Rücken deiner blutigen Hand den Schweiß von der Stirn. Die Brust des Patienten hebt und senkt sich regelmäßig. Er ist zwar noch nicht über den Berg, hat aber immerhin die Chance, lange genug zu überleben, um operiert zu werden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du trittst zurück und wischst dir mit dem Rücken deiner blutigen Hand den Schweiß von der Stirn. Die Brust des Patienten hebt und senkt sich regelmäßig. Er ist zwar noch nicht über den Berg, hat aber immerhin die Chance, lange genug zu überleben, um operiert zu werden.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das un paso atrás y te limpias el sudor de la frente con el dorso de tu mano ensangrentada. El pecho del paciente sube y baja a un ritmo regular, y, aunque aún no está fuera de peligro, al menos tiene una posibilidad de sobrevivir el tiempo suficiente para realizarle la operación que necesita.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das un paso atrás y te limpias el sudor de la frente con el dorso de tu mano ensangrentada. El pecho del paciente sube y baja a un ritmo regular, y, aunque aún no está fuera de peligro, al menos tiene una posibilidad de sobrevivir el tiempo suficiente para realizarle la operación que necesita.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你后退一步，用染血的手背擦去额头的汗水。病人的胸口稳定起伏，虽然尚未完全脱险，但至少有了撑到接受完整手术的一线生机。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You step back and wipe the sweat from your brow with the back of your bloodied hand. The patient's chest rises and falls steadily, and though his life is not yet saved, he has at least some chance of surviving long enough to be operated on fully.{/n}
